name: Mexicali Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups Old El Paso Tamales (14.5 oz.)
2/3 can condensed Cream of Chicken soup (10.5 oz.)
2/3 can Vienna Sausages, cut into thirds
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wrappers from the first can of tamales and cut them into thirds.
2. Combine the cut tamales, hominy, sausages, and Cream of Chicken soup in a 1.5-quart casserole dish.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
4. Remove wrappers from the second can of tamales and cut them diagonally into halves.
5. Garnish the top of the casserole with the remaining cut tamales.
6. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top.
7. Return the dish to the oven to melt the cheese and heat the top tamales.
8. Serves 6.
